ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hooks" (
  "hook_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hook */,
  "file" TEXT /* The file where the hook is defined */,
  "hook_name" TEXT /* The name of the hook */,
  "hook_type" TEXT /* The type of the hook (e.g., Filter, Action) */,
  "explanation" TEXT /* A detailed explanation of what the hook does */,
  "code" TEXT /* The code snippet implementing the hook */,
  "plugin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the plugin that registered the hook */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* The priority level of the hook to determine execution order */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the hook is currently active */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* The last time the hook was modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the developer who created the hook */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the developer who last modified the hook */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hook_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hooks_hook_type FOREIGN KEY ("hook_type") REFERENCES hook_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hooks_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hooks_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hooks_plugin_id FOREIGN KEY ("plugin_id") REFERENCES plugins ("plugin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plugins" (
  "plugin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plugin */,
  "plugin_name" TEXT /* Name of the plugin */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the plugin */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the plugin */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plugin */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the plugin was installed */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the plugin is currently active */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* The last time the plugin was modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the developer who created the plugin */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the developer who last modified the plugin */,
  "documentation_url" TEXT /* URL to the plugin's documentation */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* List of other plugins or system components this plugin depends on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plugin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plugins_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plugins_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hook_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hook type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the hook type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hook type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the hook type is currently active */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* The last time the hook type was modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the developer who created the hook type */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the developer who last modified the hook type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hook_types_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hook_types_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hook_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hook usage event */,
  "hook_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hook being used */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer using the hook */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the hook was used */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the usage */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the hook usage was successful */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the hook usage in milliseconds */,
  "environment" TEXT /* The environment in which the hook was used (e.g., production, staging) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hook_usage_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hook_usage_hook_id FOREIGN KEY ("hook_id") REFERENCES hooks ("hook_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the developer (e.g., Admin, Developer) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last time the developer logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the developer (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hook_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "hook_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hook that was executed */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date when the hook was executed */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Time when the hook was executed */,
  "execution_result" TEXT /* Result of the hook execution */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context in which the hook was executed */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the hook execution was successful */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the hook execution in milliseconds */,
  "environment" TEXT /* The environment in which the hook was executed (e.g., production, staging) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hook_logs_hook_id FOREIGN KEY ("hook_id") REFERENCES hooks ("hook_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hook_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "hook_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hook that has a dependency */,
  "dependent_component" TEXT /* Name of the dependent component (e.g., another hook, a module, a function) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dependency */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the dependency is critical */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* The last time the dependency was modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the developer who created the dependency */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the developer who last modified the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hook_dependencies_hook_id FOREIGN KEY ("hook_id") REFERENCES hooks ("hook_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hook_dependencies_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hook_dependencies_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hook_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "hook_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hook associated with the metadata */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., note, tag, documentation) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the metadata is public */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* The last time the metadata was modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the developer who created the metadata */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the developer who last modified the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hook_metadata_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hook_metadata_hook_id FOREIGN KEY ("hook_id") REFERENCES hooks ("hook_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hook_metadata_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)
